name: Xiang Yu

skills.name: Resolute Will
skills.description:
When his Health drops to a certain level, he gains damage reduction.
Skill uses grant enhanced Basic Attacks.

skills.name: Righteous Fervor
skills.description: Dashes forward and knocks back the enemy. At the end of the dash, launches the enemy, deals damage, and gains an enhanced Basic Attack.

skills.name: No Retreat
skills.description: Slows nearby enemies and reduces their damage output while dealing damage. Gains an enhanced Basic Attack and increased Movement Speed.

skills.name: Hegemon's Slash
skills.description:
Gains crowd control immunity and Undying while using. Deals damage to enemies in the target direction, and deals extra damage to and stuns nearby enemies.
The lower his Health, the higher the damage.

skillsZh.name: 陷陣之志
skillsZh.description:
項羽生命值過低時獲得減傷。
項羽使用技能獲得強化普攻。

skillsZh.name: 無畏衝鋒
skillsZh.description: 項羽向前衝撞將敵人擊退，結束時上挑造成擊飛效果和傷害，並獲得強化普攻。

skillsZh.name: 破釜沉舟
skillsZh.description: 項羽使附近範圍內敵人減速，並弱化其輸出能力，同時造成傷害。自身獲得強化普攻和加速。

skillsZh.name: 霸王斬
skillsZh.description:
項羽施法期間獲得霸體和不屈效果，期間免疫死亡。對指定朝向的敵人造成傷害，對近處敵人造成額外傷害和暈眩。
項羽生命值越低傷害越高。

tips: Xiang Yu (Tank): Tier A — 50.72% WR (Camp HOK).
Build: Longnight Guardian, Sage's Sanctuary, Amble - Winter.
tipsZh: 項羽（對抗路）：梯度 A，勝率 50.72%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：永夜守護、賢者的庇護、徐行・凜冬.

patchHistory.change: Enhanced Basic Attack and Ultimate Effect Upgrade
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
patchHistory.detail:
We're increasing the base Health of some tanks but decreasing their per-level Health growth multiplier so that their Health at max level stays the same.
We hope that players will be able to tell the difference between the heroes in the early game and fully understand their individual characteristics. This should help them choose the best hero for their team's lineup. We want tanks to soak up damage in the early game without becoming hard to counter in the late game. To that end, we're increasing their base Health while decreasing their Health gain per level.

patchHistoryZh.change: 強化普攻&大招效果升級
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
patchHistoryZh.detail:
提升部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，降低其隨英雄等級成長的係數，保持滿級後總生命不變
我們希望在遊戲早期就能讓玩家區分各英雄間的差異和特點，從而根據陣容需求來選擇自己接下來要操控的英雄。我們希望坦克類英雄能在遊戲早期就承擔吸收傷害的職責，但是又不希望他們在遊戲後期變得難以處理，因此我們適當提升了部分坦克類英雄的基礎生命，並降低了他們每次升級後帶來的生命成長。

faqs.question: Is Xiang Yu good in current season?
faqs.answer: Xiang Yu is Tier A Tank with 50.72% win rate, 0.79% pick rate, and 0.04% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Xiang Yu build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Longnight Guardian, Sage's Sanctuary, Amble - Winter, Cuirass of Savagery, Blood Rage, Eye of the Phoenix.

faqs.question: How to counter Xiang Yu?
faqs.answer: Pick Han Xin, Kui, Lam. Strong into Dharma, Arthur.

faqsZh.question: 項羽 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 項羽 為 A 梯度，勝率 50.72%、選取 0.79%、禁用 0.04%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 項羽 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：永夜守護、賢者的庇護、徐行・凜冬、暴烈之甲、血魔之怒、不死鳥之眼.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 項羽？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Han Xin、Kui、Lam。項羽 克制 Dharma、Arthur。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Dharma, Arthur. Weak into: Han Xin, Kui, Lam.

guide.overview: Xiang Yu is a Easy Tank (Clash Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 50.7% win rate and 0.8% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Xiang Yu: Gains damage immunity when Health falls below 30%.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Resistance, Eye of the Phoenix, Blazing Cape, then complete Spikemail, Longnight Guardian. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate for stats that match Xiang Yu's Tank kit. Take Flash — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Righteous Fervor → No Retreat → Hegemon's Slash → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Hegemon's Slash (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Max primary utility/damage skill first, then Righteous Fervor, and Hegemon's Slash on cooldown.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Righteous Fervor → No Retreat → Hegemon's Slash → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Clash Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Trade on your power spike levels (2/4). Call jungler for dive only when enemy flash is down.
guide.teamfight: Engage on enemy carry when your team has follow-up. Body-block skillshots for your marksman.
guide.highRank: Xiang Yu is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 50.7% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 0.8% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Xiang Yu.
comparisons: Xiang Yu vs Kaizer (Tank, Tier S): Kaizer is 1.6% pick / 51.4% WR. Kaizer wins 0.7% more often globally. Choose Xiang Yu when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Kaizer for Clash Lane comfort.
Xiang Yu vs Dun (Tank, Tier S): Dun is 1.5% pick / 52.3% WR. Dun wins 1.6% more often globally. Choose Xiang Yu when you need Clash Lane identity; choose Dun for Clash Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Xiang Yu excels into Dharma, Arthur. Avoid blind picking into Han Xin, Kui, Lam without team peel.
